text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We attend a meet and greet for fans and their
families.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! It's time for lunch, everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Timid Girl
text_block_list.text: C-Curren! Um... This is my omelet...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! It looks delicious! It's so fluffy and shiny!

text_block_list.name: Timid Girl
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! My mom's omelets are the best! You can
try some too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Thank you! Okay, Mom, I'll have just one
bite!

text_block_list.name: Timid Girl's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So cute! B-by all means, have as much as you
want!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Boy
text_block_list.text: C-Curren! You can have some of my lunch too!

text_block_list.name: Precocious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Hey, no fair! I wanna give Curren my whole lunch!
My dad's rice balls are top-class!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Everything?! You're all so sweet. I dunno if I
can eat all this!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But hey, umm... aren't these your favorite foods?
I'd feel bad if I ate them all myself...

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: IT'S FINE!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...W-wow! Really? Maybe we should ask your
parents first...

text_block_list.name: Parents
text_block_list.text: WE'D BE HONORED!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Are you suuuure?
choice_data_list: How about you share with me?
How about you share with me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Are you suuuure?
choice_data_list: How about you share with me?
How about you share with me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone. I think my trainer's hungry too. Do
you mind if I share?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone. I think my trainer's hungry too. Do
you mind if I share?

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: SURE!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And thank you too, Big Bro. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And thank you too, Big Sis. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we enjoy the rest of the meet and greet
lunch party.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay! ☆ I'm super full. Thank you so much,
everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Take this too!
And this! And this!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww, thanks. ♪ Your love makes me so happy!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know! How about you try feeding me some of
your lunches? ♪ Your moms and dads can take
pictures. ☆

text_block_list.name: Parents
text_block_list.text: Oh. My. GOSH! Curren Chan, you're so cute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone uploads their pictures to social media
after that, and before long,
#CurrenChanMeetandGreet is trending at number
one!
